summary: 5-phase plan for dense temporal completeness: (1) add density + dense_indicator axioms to Axioms.lean, (2) build FC-parameterized MCS infrastructure with dense_mcs_implies_base_mcs, (3) prove dense soundness using exists_between, (4) FC-parameterize chronicle construction for DenselyOrdered instance, (5) assemble completeness_dense theorem via contrapositive + MCS + chronicle

artifacts.summary: Implementation plan with 5 phases across 4 dependency waves, estimated 8 hours, covering axiom additions, FC-MCS infrastructure, dense soundness, chronicle FC-parameterization, and the completeness theorem
